TRUSTS AND TRUSTEES ACT
(REGISTER OF BENEFICIAL OWNERS)

[ L.S. 331.10

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 331.10
REGOLAMENTI DWAR TRUSTS AND TRUSTEES ACT
(REGISTER OF BENEFICIAL OWNERS)*
1 ta’ Jannar, 2018
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 373 tal-2017,kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 27 tal-2020
u 133 tal-2025.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
